'''Cassandran choholl''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage.<ref name="GG9" /> It was a fine beverage, known for its fruity and fragrant flavor,<ref name="J7">{{JournalCite|7|Missed Chance}}</ref> perhaps even better regarded than [[Cassandran brandy]]. [[Grada]] brand Cassandran Choholl was considered one of the finest types of liquors in the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], and sold for 500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] a bottle or more.<ref name="GG9" /> It was created from the leaves and fruits of the [[hafa]] vine, which was native to [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].<ref name="GATOR" />

[[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] [[Mosh Barris/Legends|Mosh Barris]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] was partial to Cassandran choholl,<ref name="J7" /> and the drink was enjoyed by [[Cryle Cavv]], [[Sienn Sconn]], and [[Shandria L'hnnar]] after the successful capture of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Guardian (Executor-class)|''Guardian'']].<ref name="J15">{{JournalCite|15|Two for One}}</ref>
